name: mure
description: 群 — a murmuration that has no leader, born from nothing. Hundreds of starlings wheel through the dusk as one body, yet not a single bird leads. Each watches only a few near neighbours and keeps three promises — align with them, draw toward their centre, and pull away when too close. From those three rules alone, the sky undulates. When a falcon crosses, alarm ripples through the flock as a wave. Deterministic from a seed; the core knows neither DOM nor network.
